_meta.description: Supplementary reference data for UI designers. Contains all registries, enums, config schemas, venue details, and operational modes — everything needed to populate dropdowns, filters, and understand domain bounds. Use alongside the OpenAPI spec.

ui_data.controls: Client-side mock data vs API calls

presets.ci: CI smoke tests, deterministic, no cache persistence
presets.mock: Local dev/UAT (default), interactive state, persists to .local-dev-cache/
presets.api-real: Test APIs against real cloud data

client-reporting.$note: Standalone client-reporting-ui archived under workspace-root archive/. Client reporting surfaces are integrated into unified-trading-system-ui.

user-management.$note: ARCHIVED: auth-api removed. Auth is Firebase-based (VITE_SKIP_AUTH in mock, Firebase OAuth in real). User management routes in unified-trading-api.

unified-trading.$note: Canonical UI + consolidated domain API (two-API model with deployment-api). Auth is Firebase, not a separate service. Legacy split UIs archived.

auth.$note: ARCHIVED: auth-api removed. Authentication handled by Firebase. DISABLE_AUTH=true in mock mode, Firebase JWT validation in real mode.

TARDIS.notes: Full-day zstd files available ~06:00 UTC for the previous day

DATABENTO.notes: T+1 batch files available shortly after midnight UTC

BARCHART.notes: Pre-loaded historical CSV; no ongoing fetch

YAHOO_FINANCE.notes: Rolling 60-day window for VIX 15m; real-time for FX rates

API_FOOTBALL.notes: Real-time API; fixtures, odds, predictions available immediately

FOOTYSTATS.notes: Real-time API for match stats and odds

SOCCER_FOOTBALL_INFO.notes: Real-time API for fixtures, teams, referees

TRANSFERMARKT.notes: Web scraper with variable lag; transfers/valuations update slowly

UNDERSTAT.notes: xG stats updated hours to days after match completion

BETFAIR.notes: Real-time Exchange Stream API; sub-second updates

POLYMARKET.notes: Public CLOB; real-time prices and orderbook

THEGRAPH.notes: Decentralised indexing; typically <1 min behind chain head

FRED.notes: Federal Reserve Economic Data; updated on release schedule
